3213040.name: Fish Game - Free Fish Pack
3213040.description:
10 FREE fish for your more sociable aquariums. These will appear in a new in-game DLC store as well as appropriate existing stores for their species. Here’s what’s in the pack!

  • Chocolate Neon Tetra

  • Bloodfin Tetra

  • Creamsicle Shortfin Molly 

  • Speckled Shortfin Molly 

  • Golden Common Goldfish

  • Red and Black Bicolor Color Common Goldfish 

  • Green Guppy 

  • Koi Guppy

  • Bronze Corydora 

  • Julii Corydora

As always, all fish have had their behavior designed to match their real-life counterparts as closely as we can with our systems, but please feel free to reach out to us if you see anything funky. 

Please note: these fish will not all appear at once in your DLC store and will still be subject to random-spawning within the DLC store. The exact fish you want might not show up right away, but it shouldn’t take long!

*具有完全音频支持的语言
